story: As a receptionist, I want to assign a medical package to a reservation so that EOD automatically posts the correct room/board/treatment splits to the folio.
As a doctor, I want to review guest diagnoses and symptoms in the medical info list to provide proper treatment.
As a SPA admin, I want to schedule a procedure for a guest ensuring no conflicts with the room/staff availability.
As a concierge, I want to log airport transfer details (flight number, time, route) so that a driver can be assigned.
As a dispatcher, I want to assign a specific vehicle and driver to a transfer request.
As a receptionist, I want transfer charges posted to the guest folio when the transfer is not complimentary.
As a sales manager, I want to create a Banquet Agreement (BEO) to block a saloon and finalize pax and advance payment.
As a sales manager, I want to select a Banquet Menu and services for the BEO to calculate total price per pax.
As an F&B manager on event day, I want a dedicated banquet ticket in POS for extras beyond the base BEO.
As a waiter, I want to close a restaurant check to a guest room folio (Room Charge).
As an accountant, I want PMS to push daily revenue and payment totals to GL via API.
